---
title: "Certamen Religiosum: or, a Conference between His late Majestie Charles King of England, and Henry late Marquess and Earl of Worcester, concerning religion"
---

## Certamen Religiosum: or, a Conference between His late Majestie Charles King of England, and Henry late Marquess and Earl of Worcester, concerning religion

**Author:** Thomas Bayly
**Date:** 1649
**Imprint:** London: Hils

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
